properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Oh happy day, That fixed my choice On Thee, my Savior and my God! Well may this glowing heart rejoice, And tell its raptures all abroad.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Oh, happy day, Oh, happy day, When Jesus washed my sins away! He taught me how to watch and pray, And live rejoicing every day: (Hallelujah!) Oh happy day, On happy day, When Jesus washed my sins away!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh, happy bond, That seals my vows To Him Who merits all my love! Let cheerful anthems fill His house, While to that sacred shrine I move.

verse.name: v4
